title: fyi-archive: A read-only full-site archive of fyi.org.nz (NZ Official Information Act request register)
description: A faithful, read-only archive of fyi.org.nz, the New Zealand Official Information Act (OIA) request register (Alaveteli). Captures request metadata, rendered pages, and attachments as WARC/WACZ, distributed to Hugging Face (live), Zenodo (DOI snapshot), and OSF (mirror). Capture is performed by fyi-cli; this repository is the orchestration and distribution layer.
